mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS declines > 0.2pp over 3 months

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate signals stronger labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE declines > 0.3pp over 1 month

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates stronger manufacturing activity that drives corporate profit growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO increases > 1.5pp over 3 months

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts signal increased consumer demand for durable goods that boosts corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST increases > 100k units over 1 month

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in both the federal funds rate and inflation expectations signal accommodative monetary policy that drives equity valuations higher, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns when both FEDFUNDS < 0.5% and CPIAUCSL < 285

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in GDP growth during a recession signals deteriorating economic fundamentals that drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where GDPC1 declines > 1.0% annualized over 1 quarter

mechanism_narrative: Persistent job creation in the labor market indicates sustained economic expansion that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns when PAYEMS increases by > 100k in 1 month

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in real sales and housing starts signal robust consumer demand that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises > 5.0% in 1 month and HOUST rises > 50k units in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns when both RSAFS and HOUST increase by > 5.0% and 50k units respectively over 1 month
